project.name: KhelIQ - AI Football Highlights
project.description: An AI-powered football highlight generation platform with a Next.js frontend and Python FastAPI backend. Uses Swin Transformer models for multimodal video analysis, Whisper for audio transcription, and Gemini AI for commentary generation. Features RAG-based querying, live HLS streaming with real-time highlight detection, and automatic video clip generation.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: Main FastAPI application serving video analysis API. Contains VideoRAGQuerier class with event deduplication, Gemini AI integration, commentary support, and video clip generation via ffmpeg.

nodes.name: hybrid_rag.py
nodes.summary: Hybrid Football Video Analysis System combining time-based indexing for precise temporal queries and FAISS semantic search for content-based queries. Implements intelligent query routing between temporal and semantic search methods with Gemini AI analysis.

nodes.name: rag_query_helper.py
nodes.summary: Video RAG Query Helper with event deduplication and natural language query processing. Supports question answering and narrative generation for football events.

nodes.name: enhanced_rag_query_helper.py
nodes.summary: Smart Football Video RAG Query Helper with rule-based deduplication (no extra API calls). Implements intelligent goal deduplication using 30-second windows, celebration detection, and replay filtering.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI-based multimodal football event detection system with video analysis, audio transcription using Whisper, and AI-powered commentary verification. Includes PyTorch Swin Transformer models and automatic video clip generation.

nodes.name: app2.py
nodes.summary: Enhanced version of the football event detection system with MongoDB integration, WebSocket progress tracking, chunked video processing for long videos, and RESTful API endpoints for match management.

nodes.name: process_video_segments.py
nodes.summary: Video segment processor that adds global timestamps to frame data, optimizes structure for RAG systems, creates searchable event indexes, and processes batch JSON files with temporal mapping.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Simple configuration file containing the Gemini API key for Google Gemini integration.

nodes.name: live_app.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI live HLS highlight generation service on port 8500. Provides endpoints to start/stop live analysis sessions, WebSocket real-time progress events, and ML-based highlight detection from HLS streams.

nodes.name: live_models.py
nodes.summary: Singleton loader for RobustMultiModalDetector. Loads ML models from generator/ once at process startup and reuses across all live sessions.

nodes.name: live_session.py
nodes.summary: MongoDB helpers and dataclasses for live HLS analysis sessions. Defines LiveSession and LiveEvent dataclasses with async CRUD operations.

nodes.name: live_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Simulates a live HLS stream using existing pre-segmented VOD content. FastAPI app on port 8600 serves VOD segments as if they are live.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: HLS main entry point - FastAPI app for video upload and HLS streaming. Provides endpoints to upload videos, convert to multi-bitrate HLS using FFmpeg.

nodes.name: converter.py
nodes.summary: HLS conversion utilities using FFmpeg. Provides convert_to_hls_multi for creating multi-bitrate HLS streams and clip extraction functions.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Main landing page assembling marketing sections including Hero, Problem, Solution, Features, Technology, Benefits, About, and CTA sections with navigation and footer.

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root layout with Poppins and GeistMono fonts, dark theme, Vercel Analytics, and Suspense boundary for the application.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat interface for querying match events with AI analysis. Features message history, video dialogs, frame detail modals, and URL fixing utilities for backend integration.

nodes.name: AnalysisDisplay.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays AI analysis results with video thumbnails, event details, commentary timeline, and frame-by-frame analysis. Supports single events and multiple event grids.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Matches listing page with status filter tabs, grid view of match cards with posters, and navigation to individual match details.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Individual match detail page with video player, WebSocket progress tracking, event statistics, timeline, clip sidebar with play/download, and match management.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Video upload page with form for match title, date, video file, poster image, and description. Features upload progress, preview, and confirmation dialogs.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Live streaming page for real-time highlight detection from HLS streams. Features WebSocket connection, activity log, live stats, clips gallery, and past sessions management.

nodes.name: site-nav.tsx
nodes.summary: Site navigation component with logo and navigation links.

nodes.name: hero-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Hero section component with call-to-action buttons and branding.

nodes.name: hero-placeholder.tsx
nodes.summary: Hero placeholder component with background image and primary CTAs.

nodes.name: content-card.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable content card component for displaying media content.

nodes.name: feature-carousel.tsx
nodes.summary: Feature carousel component with auto-scroll and navigation controls.

nodes.name: features-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Features section showcasing AI solution capabilities.

nodes.name: filter-pills.tsx
nodes.summary: Filter pills component for status filtering.

nodes.name: content-grid.tsx
nodes.summary: Content grid component using SectionRow for horizontal scrolling.

nodes.name: about-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page section about KhelIQ's mission to digitize grassroots football.

nodes.name: benefits-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page section showing who benefits from AI-powered highlights.

nodes.name: confirm-dialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable modal dialog for confirmations, alerts, and info messages.

nodes.name: final-cta-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page call-to-action section with links to chat and upload.

nodes.name: footer.tsx
nodes.summary: Site footer with navigation links and branding.

nodes.name: how-it-works.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page section showing the 6-step process of AI highlight generation.

nodes.name: problem-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page section highlighting the problems with manual video editing.

nodes.name: section-row.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable horizontal scrollable row for content cards.

nodes.name: solution-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Landing page section showcasing AI solution capabilities.

nodes.name: tech-stack.tsx
nodes.summary: Technology stack showcase component displaying AI/ML technologies used in the project.

nodes.name: technology-section.tsx
nodes.summary: Technology section component highlighting Computer Vision and Vision-Language Models.

nodes.name: theme-provider.tsx
nodes.summary: Theme provider wrapper for next-themes to handle dark/light mode.

nodes.name: button.tsx
nodes.summary: Shadcn UI Button component with variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes.

nodes.name: card.tsx
nodes.summary: Shadcn UI Card component with sub-components for header, title, description, action, content, and footer.

nodes.name: collapsible.tsx
nodes.summary: Shadcn UI Collapsible component wrapper around Radix UI.

nodes.name: dialog.tsx
nodes.summary: Shadcn UI Dialog component with overlay, content, header, footer, title, and description sub-components.

nodes.name: input.tsx
nodes.summary: Shadcn UI Input component with focus states and validation styling.

nodes.name: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Utility functions including cn() for combining Tailwind classes with clsx and tailwind-merge.

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS with Tailwind v4 configuration using Claude theme (warm orange/brown primary with refined neutrals).

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS with Tailwind v4 configuration using default neutral theme.

nodes.name: VideoRAGQuerier
nodes.summary: Main class for video RAG queries with FastAPI integration. Handles data loading, event deduplication, Gemini API setup, natural language query processing.

nodes.name: HybridVideoRAGQuerier
nodes.summary: Intelligent router between temporal and semantic search. Detects query type and routes to appropriate search method. Integrates both TimeBasedIndex and FAISSSemanticIndex with Gemini AI.

nodes.name: TimeBasedIndex
nodes.summary: Handles precise temporal queries for football video analysis. Loads preprocessed video data and provides time-based event retrieval.

nodes.name: FAISSSemanticIndex
nodes.summary: Handles semantic similarity queries using FAISS and sentence transformers. Creates embeddings for video frames and performs cosine similarity search.

nodes.name: VideoRAGQuerier
nodes.summary: Original Video RAG Querier class with event deduplication, natural language query handling, Gemini AI integration, and interactive CLI mode.

nodes.name: SmartVideoRAGQuerier
nodes.summary: Enhanced querier with rule-based deduplication. Implements smart goal filtering using 30-second windows, celebration/replay detection.

nodes.name: RobustMultiModalDetector
nodes.summary: Main detector class that orchestrates video processing with both Swin Transformer models, audio transcription, and multimodal fusion.

nodes.name: EnhancedSwinSmallTransformer
nodes.summary: Enhanced Swin Transformer model with context-aware temporal module, LSTM layers, multi-head attention, and frame importance weighting for football event classification.

nodes.name: RobustCommentaryAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Audio analysis class using OpenAI Whisper for transcription and fuzzy matching for event keyword detection. Supports replay detection.

nodes.name: MultimodalFusionEngine
nodes.summary: Fuses video and audio detections with event-level confidence rules. Handles audio verification, event correction, replay filtering, and trim window overlap prevention.

nodes.name: FootballSequenceValidator
nodes.summary: Validates and prunes football events based on game sequence rules. Ensures valid event transitions with temporal constraints.

nodes.name: LiveSession
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a live HLS analysis session. Tracks session state including HLS URL, analysis window size, download/analyzed counts, events, clips, and status.

nodes.name: LiveEvent
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a detected event in a live session. Contains timestamp, event type, confidence, clip URL/path, and audio verification status.

nodes.name: LiveStream
nodes.summary: State class for simulated live stream. Parses VOD m3u8, maintains sliding window of released segments, and builds live-style playlists.

nodes.name: _ModelManager
nodes.summary: Thread-safe singleton that holds the ML detector. Lazy-loads RobustMultiModalDetector on first call.

nodes.name: VideoSegmentProcessor
nodes.summary: Processes video segment JSON files to add global timestamps, update file paths, create RAG-optimized descriptions, and build searchable event indexes.

layers.name: Backend API Layer
layers.description: FastAPI endpoints for video analysis, live streaming, HLS processing, and RAG queries. Handles HTTP requests, WebSocket connections, and serves ML-generated highlights.

layers.name: ML Analysis Layer
layers.description: Machine learning components for football event detection including Swin Transformer models, multimodal fusion, audio transcription with Whisper, and sequence validation.

layers.name: Data Persistence Layer
layers.description: MongoDB session management, live streaming data models, ML model loading singleton, and video segment processing for RAG systems.

layers.name: Video Processing Layer
layers.description: FFmpeg-based video conversion utilities for HLS streaming, multi-bitrate transcoding, segment concatenation, and highlight clip extraction.

layers.name: Frontend Pages Layer
layers.description: Next.js app router pages including landing page, chat interface, match browser, video upload, and live streaming interface with WebSocket integration.

layers.name: Frontend Components Layer
layers.description: React components for landing page sections, navigation, hero, feature showcases, and marketing content.

layers.name: UI Foundation Layer
layers.description: Shadcn UI components (button, card, dialog, input, collapsible), theme provider, Tailwind CSS configuration, and utility functions for class merging.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the main landing page (page.tsx) and root layout (layout.tsx). The project is KhelIQ - an AI-powered football highlight generation platform with a Next.js frontend and Python FastAPI backend using Swin Transformer models for video analysis.

tour.title: Backend API Entry Point
tour.description: The backend/app.py is the main FastAPI application serving video analysis API. It contains VideoRAGQuerier class with event deduplication, Gemini AI integration, and video clip generation via ffmpeg.

tour.title: ML Event Detection
tour.description: The generator/app.py contains the multimodal football event detection system with Swin Transformer models, audio transcription using Whisper, and AI-powered commentary verification. This is the core ML engine.

tour.title: Hybrid RAG System
tour.description: The hybrid_rag.py combines time-based indexing for precise temporal queries and FAISS semantic search for content-based queries. It intelligently routes queries between temporal and semantic search with Gemini AI analysis.

tour.title: Live Streaming
tour.description: The HLS streaming system (live_app.py) provides real-time highlight detection from HLS streams. It uses WebSocket for progress updates, manages analysis sessions, and integrates with the ML detector for live events.

tour.title: Video Processing Utilities
tour.description: The converter.py provides FFmpeg-based utilities for HLS streaming including multi-bitrate transcoding, segment concatenation, and highlight clip extraction.

tour.title: Chat Interface
tour.description: The chat/page.tsx provides a natural language interface for querying match events with AI analysis. It features message history, video dialogs, and frame detail modals.

tour.title: Match Management
tour.description: The matches system (matches/page.tsx and [match_id]/page.tsx) handles match browsing, detailed match views with video player, WebSocket progress tracking, and clip management with play/download functionality.

tour.title: Live Streaming UI
tour.description: The live/page.tsx provides the interface for real-time highlight detection from HLS streams with WebSocket connection, activity log, live stats, clips gallery, and past sessions management.

tour.title: UI Components
tour.description: The frontend uses Shadcn UI components (button, card, dialog, input) built on Radix UI primitives, with Tailwind CSS for styling and next-themes for dark/light mode support.
